title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech discusses whether Google engineers use AI-assisted code generation ("vibing code") compared to OpenAI Codex and Claude Code. The video spans Google's practices from 2024 through 2026 projections, including analysis of their internal tools and approach to AI-assisted development.
